title: Amtech G1610 280mm (11") Notched float trowel with wooden handle
availability_text: Only 5 left in stock (more on the way).
features: DURABLE: This 280mm (11") notched float trowel has a hardened and tempered carbon steel blade for durability
VERSATILE AND COMFORTABLE TO USE: With a banana shaped wooden handle for a comfortable grip, it has 8mm x 8mm notches on two sides and is ideal for applying adhesive for wall and floor tiles
SIZE CAPACITY: 11 inch / 8 mm / 280 mm range ideal for household and trade applications
PRECISION PERFORMANCE: Provides smooth and accurate results
PLUMBING APPLICATIONS: Essential for household and trade pipework
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning Always use genuine Amtech products. Follow proper usage guidelines to avoid injury. Keep away from children. Do not use for digging unless wearing appropriate eye protection. Be aware of and avoid underground utilities. Box Contains Trowel notched See more
